name: OpenSearch (uvx)
description: Connect to OpenSearch and Amazon OpenSearch Service clusters to search indices, retrieve mappings, inspect shards, and run cluster operations. Supports basic auth, AWS IAM, and dynamic per-call connection parameters.

inputs.label: OpenSearch URL
inputs.description: Base URL of your OpenSearch cluster endpoint, e.g. https://localhost:9200 or your Amazon OpenSearch Service domain endpoint. Can be omitted if agents supply connection details per tool call.

obtain.instructions:
1. Use your self-managed OpenSearch endpoint (e.g. https://localhost:9200), or
2. For Amazon OpenSearch Service, copy the domain endpoint from the AWS console (OpenSearch Service > Domains > your domain > Domain endpoint).

inputs.label: OpenSearch Username
inputs.description: Username for HTTP basic authentication. Leave blank when using AWS IAM auth, mTLS, or connecting to a cluster with no auth.

inputs.label: OpenSearch Password
inputs.description: Password for HTTP basic authentication. Leave blank when using AWS IAM auth, mTLS, or connecting to a cluster with no auth.

auth.instructions: For basic auth, set OPENSEARCH_USERNAME and OPENSEARCH_PASSWORD. For Amazon OpenSearch Service, use AWS IAM credentials from your environment (AWS_REGION, AWS_PROFILE/AWS_IAM_ARN) instead. The server can also start with no credentials and accept connection details per tool call.
